query_trace.query:
```sql
SELECT
  b.title
FROM books_info AS b
JOIN review AS r
  ON b.book_id = r.purchase_id
WHERE
  b.categories LIKE '%"Children\'s Books"%'
  AND r.date >= '2020-01-01'
GROUP BY
  b.title
HAVING
  AVG(r.rating) >= 4.5;
```
query_trace.result: {"error":"error processing request: unable to execute query: ERROR: syntax error at or near \"```\" (SQLSTATE 42601)"}

parameters.query:
```sql
SELECT
  b.title
FROM books_info AS b
JOIN review AS r
  ON b.book_id = r.purchase_id
WHERE
  b.categories LIKE '%"Children\'s Books"%'
  AND r.date >= '2020-01-01'
GROUP BY
  b.title
HAVING
  AVG(r.rating) >= 4.5;
```

trace_events.query_text: Which books categorized as 'Children's Books' have received an average rating of at least 4.5 based on reviews from 2020 onwards?
